🎯 AUTO-RESPONSE TEMPLATES (Deployed)
  
  QUESTIONS (Keywords: how, what, cost, timeline, tools, help)
    1. "How to Start" → New beginner guidance
    2. "Timeline" → Expectation setting (2-4 weeks)
    3. "Tools & Budget" → Resource breakdown ($0-200/month)

  PRAISE (Keywords: amazing, inspiring, love, great, thank you)
    1. "Positive Feedback" → Encouragement + direct offer
    2. "Inspiring Story" → Feature invitation
    3. "Gratitude" → Personal connection
    
  SPAM (Keywords: crypto, bitcoin, mlm, "work from home", click here)
    → Auto-filtered (no response, logged only)
  
  SALES (Keywords: partnership, collaboration, sponsorship, brand deal)
    → Flagged for manual review (high priority)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚙️ LOGGING & STATE TRACKING
  
  Comments Log: .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl
    Format: JSONL (one JSON object per line)
    Retention: Unlimited (append-only)
    Size: ~45 KB
    Last Updated: 2026-04-14 19:00:40 UTC
  
  State File: .cache/youtube-comment-state.json
    Tracked IDs: 55 processed comment IDs
    Last Run: 2026-04-14 17:30:19 UTC
    Purpose: Prevent duplicate processing
  
  Monitor Log: .cache/youtube-monitor.log
    Execution details from each cron run
    Last Updated: 2026-04-14 12:30:15 PT

  Sample Log Entry (this run):
    {
      "timestamp": "2026-04-14T12:30:15.035726",
      "comment_id": "demo_1776195015.035702",
      "author": "Demo User",
      "text": "How do I start with this?",
      "category": "questions",
      "response_status": "auto_responded_questions",
      "response_text": "Great question! Start by watching our latest video on channel fundamentals..."
    }

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚠️ CURRENT LIMITATION: API AUTHENTICATION
  
  Status: Pending YouTube API credentials
  Impact: Currently running in DEMO mode (simulated comments)
  
  To Enable Real YouTube Comments:
  
  1. Go to: https://console.cloud.google.com/
  2. Create a project: "Concessa-Obvius-Monitor"
  3. Enable "YouTube Data API v3"
  4. Create OAuth 2.0 Desktop credentials
  5. Download credentials.json
  6. Save to: ~/.openclaw/workspace/.secrets/youtube-credentials.json
  7. Run: python3 youtube-comment-monitor-api.py (will request authorization)
  8. Follow browser prompt to authorize
  
  Once authorized:
    ✅ Will fetch REAL comments from Concessa Obvius channel
    ✅ Auto-respond to questions & praise
    ✅ Flag sales inquiries for review
    ✅ Continue logging all activity

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🚀 OPERATIONAL COMMANDS

  Check Today's Comments:
    tail -20 .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | jq .

  Find Questions (need responses):
    grep '"category":"questions"' .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | jq .

  Find Flagged Sales (need review):
    grep 'flagged_for_review' .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | jq .

  Count Auto-Responses Today:
    grep 'auto_responded' .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | wc -l

  View State (lifetime stats):
    cat .cache/youtube-comment-state.json | jq .

  Manual Trigger (run now, don't wait 30 min):
    python3 youtube-comment-monitor-api.py

  Check Cron Schedule:
    crontab -l | grep youtube

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

  IMMEDIATE (Today):

    □ Run oauth flow: python3 youtube-comment-monitor-api.py
